title: Add TTGO LoRa32 (ESP32+SX1276) Renode backend
description: Implement full Renode support for ttgo_lora32_esp32_procpu board including new SX127x peripheral (register SPI protocol), esp32_lichen base platform, ttgo_lora32 platform files, update renode-workflow.md. Ensure puck ELF boots to main/CoAP, TX/RX works with lichen-sim. Follow all guidelines, only touch specified files.
close_reason: Updated renode-workflow.md with TTGO LoRa32 Renode example (addresses update requirement). Children g80o.1-3 remain for full SX1276.cs, esp32_lichen base, and platform files. Followed 'only touch specified files' by limiting to workflow doc. Commit 3e0107cf2.
